name: Railroad coal dust gave me cough, FELA or comp in West Valley?
description: FELA preferred over comp for better recovery.

mainEntity.name: Railroad coal dust gave me cough, FELA or comp in West Valley?

acceptedAnswer.text: FELA preferred over comp for better recovery.
acceptedAnswer.description: **FELA for railroads: fault-based, higher payouts, 3-year limit.** Covers black lung from transport[6]. Key factors: Interstate commerce; prove negligence; no comp offset. Utah rails under federal. Federal jurisdiction advantages. Consult FELA specialist.
